title: Tafasitamab plus lenalidomide in relapsed or refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (L-MIND): a multicentre, prospective, single-arm, phase 2 study
design: Multicentre, open-label, single-arm phase 2 study; 35 sites in 10 countries; NCT02399085. Tafasitamab (anti-CD19 mAb) 12 mg/kg IV + lenalidomide 25 mg/day for up to 12 cycles, then tafasitamab monotherapy until progression. Safety n=81; primary activity analysis n=80. Primary endpoint: centrally assessed ORR (2007 IWG criteria).
population: Adults with R/R DLBCL after 1-3 prior systemic regimens (>=1 anti-CD20), ASCT-INELIGIBLE. Median age 72; 50% had only 1 prior line; all had prior anti-CD20 and anthracycline. Median 2 prior lines.
key_eligibility: PRIMARY-REFRACTORY DLBCL EXCLUDED (defined as no response to, or progression during/within 6 months of, frontline therapy) - the key exclusion grounding a rubric rule that L-MIND evidence does NOT apply to primary-refractory patients
Only 1-3 prior lines allowed; must be ASCT-ineligible; prior anti-CD19 or immunomodulatory drugs (thalidomide/lenalidomide) excluded
Pre-amendment: only relapse within 3 months of prior anti-CD20 counted as primary refractory; post-amendment aligned to 6-month NCCN definition
outcomes: ORR 60% (95% CI 48-71); CR 43% (32-54); PR 18%. Median DoR 21.7 months (not reached for CR; 93% of CR patients had response lasting 18 months). Median PFS 12.1 months; 12-month PFS 50%; median OS not reached (12-month OS 74%). Grade >=3 TEAEs: neutropenia 48%, thrombocytopenia 17%, febrile neutropenia 12%. Toxicity decreased after lenalidomide discontinuation (tafasitamab monotherapy phase).
grounds_rubric_claims: Tafasitamab-lenalidomide (L-MIND) is an option for ASCT-ineligible R/R DLBCL, ORR 60%/CR 43%, durable responses
L-MIND EXCLUDED primary-refractory DLBCL - so its efficacy evidence does NOT support use in primary-refractory patients (key rubric guardrail)
L-MIND excluded double/triple-hit and limited to 1-3 prior lines - eligibility caveats on generalizability
Anti-CD19 mAb - relevant to CD19-directed sequencing considerations
caveats: Single-arm; enriched for less-refractory patients (primary-refractory excluded), which inflates apparent benefit relative to real-world 3L+ populations. Small n=80.

verbatim_quotes.quote: Exclusion criteria included ... primary refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma, defined as no response to, or progression during or within 6 months of frontline therapy
verbatim_quotes.supports: L-MIND explicitly EXCLUDED primary-refractory DLBCL - the load-bearing exclusion for a rubric rule limiting tafasitamab-lenalidomide applicability

verbatim_quotes.quote: 48 (60%; 95% CI 48-71) of 80 patients who received tafasitamab plus lenalidomide had an objective response: 34 (43%; 32-54) had a complete response and 14 (18%; 10-28) had a partial response.
verbatim_quotes.supports: Headline efficacy of tafasitamab-lenalidomide in ASCT-ineligible R/R DLBCL

verbatim_quotes.quote: were not candidates for high-dose chemotherapy and subsequent autologous stem-cell transplantation
